name: excalidraw-diagram
purpose: Generate consolidated Excalidraw workflow diagrams from discovered Java and C# logic flows. Generates Mermaid, Excalidraw JSON, and PNG previews.

consolidationRule.description: Maximum 2 consolidated diagrams per module: ONE unified diagram for all Java workflows and ONE for all C# workflows. Shows all branches, pivots, and outcomes in single diagram per language.

multiLanguageConsolidation.description: Automatically consolidates all workflows of the same language into unified Excalidraw diagram showing all branches (VALID/INVALID paths)

allBranchesVisible.description: Diagram shows decision branches, error paths, alternative actions all in one view per language

pngRendering.description: Generates PNG previews for dashboard visualization

mermaidExport.description: Exports Mermaid flowchart source alongside Excalidraw JSON
